_notes: Canonical MCP server config for stromy-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

deliverable-canvas._notes: Shared canvas backend for strategic deliverables (proposal, messaging-framework, press-release). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID (handled by mcp-remote browser flow). See infra-docs/ai/deliverable-canvas.md.

nl-gov-data._notes: Dutch government open-data MCP — search/fetch legislation, parliamentary records, Rijksoverheid documents, plus the intel/analysis skills (nl-gov-data, tensions, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-official-issue-framing, nl-gov-shared). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID. Composes with stromy-format for rendering — see infra-docs/ai/three-layer-tooling.md.

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills (pptx, pptx-hd, docx, pdf, pdf-hd, xlsx, mermaid, diagram, chart, remotion-video). Fetched at runtime via ReadMcpResourceTool — see skills/<name>/SKILL.md stubs.
